name: Perpetual Ruinous Ride
outcome: With you trapped sitting in the gooey mire, two of the Perpetuas snuggle up to your sides, lasciviously cooing and rubbing themselves against you, whispering sweet mind-melting words straight into your ears amid sensual caresses and massassing gropes.|n|Meanwhile, the red Perpetua smugly faces away from you while her slimy confines suck and squeeze your twitching erection, treating you like a mix of throne and sex toy, each jiggly impact resonating through you like a melty wave, demanding you relax and submit while she lets out smugly pleasured sounds, clearly relishing her dominant position.
miss: With you trapped sitting in the gooey mire, two of the Perpetuas snuggle up to your sides, lasciviously cooing and rubbing themselves against you, whispering sweet mind-melting words straight into your ears amid sensual caresses and massassing gropes. Meanwhile, the red Perpetua smugly faces away from you while her slimy confines keep demandingly sucking and squeezing your twitching erection, but you manage to endure the obscene ride!
